description: Create an 8-point compass rose symbol in LibreCAD centered at the origin (0,0) on a layer named 'COMPASS_ROSE'. The design must include an outer circle with radius 100, an inner circle with radius 20, four cardinal direction lines extending 100 units (North to 0,100; East to 100,0; South to 0,-100; West to -100,0), and four ordinal direction lines (NE, NW, SE, SW) extending 70 units at 45-degree angles. Include a text label 'N' at approximately (0, 110). Save the drawing as a DXF file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/compass_rose.dxf.
